summary: Frontend testing of homepage restructure (7 sections), brief pages, and /standard redirect. Most features pass. Key failure: AuthorityClockSection with 'Read Brief' clickable phase links is NOT used on any page (/operating-standard does not include it).

ui_bugs.issue: AuthorityClockSection.jsx exists with 'Read Brief' clickable phase links but is NOT imported or used on /operating-standard page or any other page. The 90-Day Clock phases are NOT clickable anywhere.
ui_bugs.selector: /operating-standard - no DIAGNOSE/BUILD/VERIFY phases with Read Brief links

action_items: Add AuthorityClockSection to /operating-standard page (OperatingStandardPage.jsx) so that the 90-Day Clock phases with clickable 'Read Brief' links are accessible
critical_code_review_comments: AuthorityClockSection.jsx at /app/frontend/src/components/AuthorityClockSection.jsx is defined with clickable phase links and '→ Read Brief' text but is not imported/used anywhere. Should be added to OperatingStandardPage.jsx.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All homepage sections pass. Only failure is AuthorityClockSection not added to /operating-standard. Once main agent adds it, verify 'Read Brief' links work on /operating-standard.
